form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Maggacis at this track over 2190m in a NR up to 45 on March 27 at $51. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing third behind Nevs Dream at this track over 2190m in a NR up to 49 on April 7 at $41. Can be competitive again from the ace draw.

Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing third behind Nevs Dream at this track over 2190m in a NR up to 49 on April 7 at $41. Can be competitive again from the ace draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and paced roughly near the 400m.
Held up for clear running approaching the home turn on the final occasion.
Gave ground to be beaten 36m into 8th placing.

form.formComment: Last start a big 6 m win as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr3) at this track (2:43.80) beating Rubbleonthedouble in NR up to 49 on April 7 at $1.95 at the bell was leading 4.6. Draws to advantage so could strike again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start a big 6 m win as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr3) at this track (2:43.80) beating Rubbleonthedouble in NR up to 49 on April 7 at $1.95 at the bell was leading 4.6. Draws to advantage so could strike again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shied at the winning post on the first occasion.
Held up around the home turn and early in the home straight shifted out.
Checked and broke gait leaving the front straight on the first occasion.
Shifted out under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Seven-year-old mare is racing in fine form. Won her last two outings at this track both over 2190m. Last start won by 6 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr2) at this track (2:42.50) beating Rojenbye in NR up to 49 on April 7 at $1.80 at the bell was leading 5. Draws well so can win again.

formComments.title: TAB

Draws well so can win again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced at various stages of the race.
Pulled hard middle stages.
Raced roughly shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 6th (Fr3) over 2190m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 65 m by Nevs Dream (2:42.50) in NR up to 49 on April 7 at $11. Before that 7th (Fr6) over 2190m after showing early speed at this track, well beaten by Indianas Son (2:43.00) in NR up to 46 on March 10 at $16. This looks far too tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to tire leaving the 400m mark to be beaten 65.8m.
Tired over the concluding stages.
Tired to be beaten 87m into 9th placing.
Surrendered the lead to Hooklineandsinker approaching the 1400m mark.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Nevs Dream at this track over 2190m in a NR up to 46 on March 27 at $3.90. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing second behind Nevs Dream at this track over 2190m in a NR up to 49 on April 7 at $7.50. Progressing well. Go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly when placed under pressure approaching the 300m mark.
Gave ground over the concluding stages.
Tired to be beaten 53m into 4th placing.
Pulled hard throughout the score up.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth after being driven well back, behind Shes Poppy at this track over 1790m in a NR 47 to 51 on March 27 at $8.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind G B Brave at this track over 2190m in a NR up to 49 on April 7 at $3.20. Chance to break through.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced erratically at various stages of the event.
Tired to be beaten 58m into 5th placing.
Held up for clear running during the early stages of the run to the finish.
Checked and sulky contacted by Diamond Krusher at approx 1100m.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr5) over 2190m after racing wide at this track, beaten 65 m by Nevs Dream (2:42.50) in NR up to 49 on April 7 at $8. At the start before good run when 2nd (Fr1) over 1790m after showing early speed at this track was leading by 2.2 at the bell, beaten 4.5 m by Shes Poppy (2:12.40) in NR 47 to 51 on March 27 at $5. Could bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide with cover from the 850m mark.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd (Sr1) over 2190m at this track, beaten 21 m by G B Brave (2:43.80) in NR up to 49 on April 7 at $4.40. In the mix.

formComments.comment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd (Sr1) over 2190m at this track, beaten 21 m by G B Brave (2:43.80) in NR up to 49 on April 7 at $4.40. In the mix.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr1) over 2190m at this track, at the bell was 3rd-5.8 beaten 16 m by Nevs Dream (2:42.50) in NR up to 49 on April 7 at $3.70. Before that, 10th (Fr5) over 1790m after being wide early at this track beaten 30 m by Shes Poppy (2:12.40) in NR 47 to 51 on March 27 at $14. Tricky draw but can play a role with even luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position when the start was effected.
Broke gait clear of interference on two separate occasions.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after only four days break. Lacklustre first-up performance when 5th (Sr2) over 2190m at this track beaten 30 m by Nevs Dream (2:42.50) in NR up to 49 on April 7 at $41. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced erratically throughout the score up.
Galloped rounding the first turn and trailed the field thereafter.
Broke gait on the first turn when clear of interference.

Before that 5th (Sr2) over 2190m at this track, beaten 45 m by Maggacis (2:43.40) in NR up to 46 on March 10 at $3.90. Prefer others.
